name: Agentic ERP: Multi-Agent Large Language Model Architecture for Autonomous Enterprise Resource Planning
summary: arXiv:2607.17331v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems record transactions reliably but still delegate almost all operational decision-making to human specialist...
description: arXiv:2607.17331v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems record transactions reliably but still delegate almost all operational decision-making to human specialists, because classical rule-based automation cannot reason about exceptions and monolithic AI assistants degrade when asked to coordinate across functional boundaries. This paper presents Agentic ERP, a...
author: Zhihao Liu, Tianyu Wang, Xi Vincent Wang, Lihui Wang
